query: I need a fresh development instance for testing a new feature. Can you spin one up in our realm with a 4-hour TTL?
I have a few sandboxes running and one of them seems frozen — it's not responding to requests. Can you list what I have running and then restart the stuck one?
I'm done testing and want to shut down my on-demand sandbox at zzpq-013 to save resources. How do I stop it?

I'm about to go on PTO for two weeks and I want to make sure my on-demand instances don't eat up the budget while I'm gone. Can you show me all my running instances so I can figure out which ones to tear down?

Our QA team needs three separate environments spun up simultaneously for parallel testing of different feature branches. What's the quickest way to provision multiple instances and check their status?
My on-demand instance was auto-stopped after hitting its TTL but I still need it for a few more hours. Can I bring it back up and extend the time, or do I need to create a new one?
I need to configure OCAPI client permissions on my sandbox to allow a new API client access to the Data API.
How do I push my cartridge code to the development instance so I can test my changes?
I need to update the site preferences on my sandbox to enable a new feature flag. Where do I set that in the site configuration?
How do I import a site archive containing promotions and content slots into my existing development instance?
